name: Lovesac Co
business: Lovesac designs, manufactures and sells modular couches (Sactionals), premium foam beanbag chairs (Sacs), home theater systems (StealthTech), and other furniture accessories. Its products are sold through showrooms and ecommerce directly to consumers. The target customer is aged 25-54 with annual household income over $75,000.

exposures.sentence: We are a technology driven company that designs, manufactures and sells unique, high quality furniture derived through our proprietary Designed for Life approach.
We believe that our ecommerce centric approach, coupled with our ability to deliver our large upholstered products through express couriers, is unique to the furniture industry.
We rely on two primary logistics and transportation carriers to fulfill our last mile product delivery services.
We are pursuing initiatives to increase domestic manufacturing of Sactional (or certain products) as part of our broader supply chain strategy.

Our Sactionals StealthTech Sound + Charge product line complements our Sactionals as a unique innovation that features immersive surround sound by Harman Kardon and convenient wireless charging, all seamlessly embedded and hidden inside the adaptable Sactionals platform.

catalysts.sentence: In September 2024, we launched the AnyTable, a versatile table that seamlessly enhances any Sactionals living space

in November 2024, we launched the Sactionals Reclining Seat, an innovation that integrates advanced reclining technology and delivers unparalleled comfort and flexibility while maintaining the sleek, sophisticated aesthetic of our Sactionals.
In May 2024, we launched the PillowSac Chair, an accessory that elevates the style and comfort of our existing PillowSac.
In May 2025, the Company launched Snugg (previously referred to as EverCouch), a new platform of premium seating.
In November 2024, we launched the StealthTech Charge Side, integrating wireless device charging into our Sactionals Sides without the need for our sound system.
In October 2025, the Company launched the PillowSac Chair Jr., which delivers the same comfort and premium materials as the PillowSac Chair, scaled for smaller spaces.

catalysts.event: Launch of Loved by Lovesac program
catalysts.sentence: In June 2025, we launched the Loved by Lovesac program which enables customers to purchase quality-assured, revitalized open-box products through our dedicated resale platform at www.lovedbylovesac.com.
In June 2025, the Company discontinued its partnership with Best Buy, resulting in the closure of all remaining Best Buy shop-in-shop locations as of February 1, 2026.
